summary: Senior Software Engineer with 5+ years building scalable, maintainable web applications. I specialize in modern frontend architectures with React, Next.js, and TypeScript, but I'm equally comfortable diving into backend systems. At Atlântico, I moved beyond writing code—I built systems that scale, mentored teams, and cut onboarding time from months to weeks. Test coverage, performance, and accessibility aren't checkbox items for me; they're foundations for quality software.

accomplishments: Architected and built scalable frontend systems with React and Next.js, emphasizing code quality, maintainability, and developer experience.
Designed and shipped component libraries that became the foundation of our Design System, enabling teams to move faster while maintaining consistency.
Achieved 85% test coverage across critical paths, significantly reducing production incidents and increasing deployment confidence.
Revamped technical planning processes for epics, reducing rework by 40% through clearer requirements and early design reviews.
Mentored junior engineers—cut onboarding time from 2 months to 3 weeks through documentation, pair programming, and thoughtful code reviews.
Built interactive educational features for the 'Luz do Saber' project, making pedagogical content more engaging for elementary students.
Delivered responsive, accessible interfaces using Vue.js and TypeScript across multiple devices.
Implemented component-driven development patterns to keep the codebase clean and sustainable as the project scaled.
Developed responsive user interfaces with React and Redux for enterprise-grade applications.
Integrated RESTful APIs to power scalable, distributed systems serving diverse use cases.
Wrote unit tests with Jest and Enzyme, building a culture of testing and reducing regression bugs.
Collaborated across distributed teams in Agile sprints to deliver on aggressive timelines.
